match.result.headline: ${winner.name} march on — ${loser.name} undone by ${margin}
match.result.subhead: ${stageLabel} clash decided as ${winner.name} chase the title
body: ${winner.name} have advanced in the WPL playoffs after dispatching ${loser.name} by ${margin} in the ${stageLabel}.
${winner.name} posted ${winner.score}, while ${loser.name} could only manage ${loser.score} in reply.

match.result.headline: Run-fest: ${winner.name} edge ${loser.name} in ${totalRuns}-run thriller
body: Batters dominated at ${venue} as ${winner.name} outgunned ${loser.name} by ${margin} in a high-scoring T20 spectacle.
${winner.name} put up ${winner.score}, ${loser.name} responding with ${loser.score} — ${totalRuns} runs scored across both innings.

match.result.headline: Photo finish: ${winner.name} sneak past ${loser.name} by ${margin}
match.result.subhead: Nail-biter at ${venue} as ${winner.name} hold their nerve
body: ${winner.name} held on by the slimmest of margins to beat ${loser.name} by ${margin} in a tense T20 finish at ${venue}.

match.result.headline: ${winner.name} crush ${loser.name} by ${margin}
body: ${winner.name} produced a clinical performance to dismantle ${loser.name} by ${margin} at ${venue}.
${winner.name} posted ${winner.score}; ${loser.name} were never in the contest at ${loser.score}.

match.result.headline: ${winner.name} beat ${loser.name} by ${margin}
body: ${winner.name} secured a ${margin} win over ${loser.name} at ${venue} on Matchday ${matchday}.
